subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! I have perused the contents of thy letter, and rejoiced at the meanings of thine epistle, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله قد اطلعت بمضمون کتابک و قد سرنی معانی خطابک لان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @knowledge; recognition of God
